violations.text: Sliced cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date mark was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The door to the outside, located by the preschool room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

Individual pastry items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to get ingredient list and allergen list from business that donates products and produce labels bearing the information on each item. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, double doors by the preschool, and the double doors by the basketball court, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to install new door sweeps and weather stripping to make door tight-fitting. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
